description: Emitting ANSI color codes or blocking on an interactive prompt when output is piped or stdin is not a terminal.
body: Failure mode: the tool always colors output and always prompts for confirmation, so piped output is full of escape sequences and scripts hang forever waiting on a prompt that no human will answer. Detection signals: escape codes appear in redirected files; a script or CI job hangs at a prompt; output is unparseable downstream. Do not assume an interactive terminal. Safer fallback: detect isatty per stream, disable color/spinners and prompts when not a TTY (honor NO_COLOR and a non-interactive flag), and provide a way to supply answers non-interactively.
